synopsis: On the forest moon of Endor, Ewoks returning from a hunt discover that woklings have been vanishing from their village. The chief Buzza blames a Dulok raid, but young Chirpa senses something worse. Chirpa and Logray set out to learn the fate of the missing children and uncover a plot at a deserted Dulok camp: the traitor Makrit has been conspiring with the Duloks to sacrifice the woklings to the Great Devourer, a towering Gorax. In a clearing, the captured woklings are found trapped within a huge wooden effigy raised like a pyre. As the Ewoks work to free them, the Gorax attacks. Ra-Lee sounds a borra horn, and a stampede of the beasts sweeps in below, carrying the Ewoks and rescued woklings to safety. Only Makrit is left behind, standing alone beneath the monster's gaze as the intended sacrifice.
title: Tales from Vader's Castle #4
